ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Lode FR #235 Xiaohongshu real read and write-precheck capability batch.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository, GitHub issue metadata, and read-only research/source locators outside Lode.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Xiaohongshu package assets, registry files, contract docs, and LODE-236 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No live Xiaohongshu login or real account access
No merge or issue closeout by this worker
validation_expectation: JSON readability check for touched package and registry JSON
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #235 #236 #237 #238 #239 and final worker report.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Xiaohongshu package assets, registry fixtures, contract docs, and LODE-236 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Harbor, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live Xiaohongshu login automation, real account access, external-visible actions, safety bypass, merge, or issue closeout.

delegation_evidence.rationale: No subagent used because this worker owns shared package truth, registry, PR metadata, and Loom carriers in one narrow branch; splitting writes would increase carrier and metadata conflict risk.

integration_evidence: Refreshed Xiaohongshu search-notes package with LODE-236 source absorption, real site entrypoints, refs-only evidence requirements, and post-check plan.
Refreshed Xiaohongshu read-note-detail package with signed-ref input boundary, real site entrypoints, refs-only evidence requirements, and post-check plan.
Refreshed Xiaohongshu publish-note-precheck package with expected change, risk hints, no-submit guard, true write blocked, and post-check plan.
Refreshed local registry and query fixture to expose the FR #235 Xiaohongshu package batch.
Live account validation was not attempted because the worker is forbidden from accessing a real account or performing external-visible actions.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This PR changes repo-local Lode package assets, registry fixtures, docs, and carriers only; it does not add runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or executable browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Validator, local registry, Core/App package discovery, Harbor/Core refs-only evidence requirements, fixture shape, post-check fixture output, source absorption record, and failure vocabulary.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR adds live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership changes.
